summary: libmicrohttpd dependency is still listed in External-Dependency-Info.txt despite being removed from the build.

repoLinks.description: Link to the file showing the issue

analysis.summary: The user reports that `libmicrohttpd` is still listed in `External-Dependency-Info.txt` even though it was removed from the Skia build in PR #3463. I have confirmed that `External-Dependency-Info.txt` still contains an entry for `libmicrohttpd`.

codeInvestigation.finding: Does not contain 'libmicrohttpd', only commented out

keySignals.text: However, it still appears in the External-Dependency-Info.txt of latest preview release (3.119.3-preview.1).

analysis.rationale: The `External-Dependency-Info.txt` file is out of sync with the actual dependencies defined in `externals/skia/DEPS`. `libmicrohttpd` was removed from `DEPS` (commented out), but the info file was not updated.

resolution.hypothesis: The External-Dependency-Info.txt file is manually maintained or the update process failed to remove the entry.

proposals.title: Remove libmicrohttpd from External-Dependency-Info.txt
proposals.description: Remove the libmicrohttpd entry from External-Dependency-Info.txt manually.

actionability.reason: This is a documentation/metadata update that needs to be done.

actions.comment: Thanks for the report! I confirmed that `libmicrohttpd` is indeed still listed in `External-Dependency-Info.txt` despite being removed from `DEPS`. We'll get this updated.
